title: Huntr/x Discs
description: Adds music disc with Huntr/x songs
body:
**This mod adds Music Discs with songs from popular k-pop group Huntr/x from movie KPop Demon Hunters.**

Adds total of 4 songs: 
1. Golden
2. What It Sounds Like
3. Takedown
4. How It's Done

### How to obtain them
First 3 can be crafted and the 4. one can be obtained from Ender Dragon

Mod doesn't need any more mods to run, expect Fabric needs Fabric API
